title: AsyncAPI Server
description: An AsyncAPI Server — describes a broker or endpoint the application connects to. The protocol field selects the binding namespace (kafka, mqtt, amqp, ws, nats, etc.).

host.description: Hostname (and optional port) of the server. Variables allowed via `{var}` template syntax.

pathname.description: Optional path component for protocols that need it (e.g. AMQP vhost, WebSocket path).

protocol.description: The protocol used. Drives which bindings are valid.

protocolVersion.description: Version of the protocol, e.g. `0.9.1` for AMQP, `5.0` for MQTT, `3.6.0` for Kafka.

variables.description: Map of variables used in the host/pathname template.

security.description: Security requirements that apply to all operations on this server.
